sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20907" key="braxu/fullos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ´-φυλλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n20907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with few leaves</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δένδρον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1589.tlg001:9:612" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.612</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
